title: LIVE final-phase INCIDENT: SOL stage-2 flatten ran away into a -1507-lot SHORT (internal qty desync 14070 vs broker 0); also launch_cmd missing --lottery-arm broke restart
why: After the BTC/ETH reweight dropped SOL (stage2 target 0), the stage-2 roll/flatten oversold SOL in a runaway loop: internal lottery_positions.SOLUSD.qty read ~14070 units (phantom long) while the broker net went long 988 -> flat -> SHORT, with the per-tick requested sell GROWING (1107->1207->1307->1507 lots, clamped 100/tick). Net: a -1507-lot SOL SHORT, -6.8k unrealized and rising (SOL was rallying), AND an unbounded up-tail short that BREAKS the section14 long-only safe envelope. Root cause = internal-qty vs broker-truth desync on the SELL-to-zero path (the buy/build path for BTC/ETH reconciled exactly: internal==broker). REMEDIATION (live): set watchdog intentional-stop flag, killed service+watchdog to halt the loop, manually flattened SOL to 0 (BUY 1507 chunked @100 IOC, all retcode 10009), repaired risk_state (SOL qty->0/exited, sod_equity re-anchored 1,019,744->1,000,730 to current equity), relaunched stage-2 BTC/ETH only. SECOND BUG found during relaunch: persisted launch_cmd.json had --stage2-lambda + --lottery-event-time but was MISSING --lottery-arm -> run_survival_live REFUSES to start (arg error), so the watchdog auto-restart-from-launch_cmd would ALSO have failed (latent, B0176 re-persist incomplete). Worked around by adding --lottery-arm.
value_rationale: A runaway crypto SHORT that breaks the section14 safe-envelope and loses money live is the most severe execution failure class; plus the launch_cmd gap silently disables crash-recovery during the unattended final.
scope: FIX 1 (desync): the stage-2 flatten/roll must size the close order from BROKER-TRUTH net qty, never the internal qty tracker; clamp the close so it can never cross zero into a short (target 0 => max sell = current broker long, never more). Add reconcile that snaps internal qty to broker each tick.

FIX 2 (launch_cmd): update_launch_cmd_stage2 must persist a COMPLETE, runnable argv (include --lottery-arm whenever --stage2-lambda is set) so watchdog restart works; add a startup self-test that the persisted argv parses.
TEST: regression for a stage-2 leg dropped to target 0 with a stale-high internal qty -> assert never crosses zero; and a launch_cmd round-trip parse test.
recommendation: Both fixes are load-bearing for the live final. Until FIX 1 ships, do NOT drop a stage-2 leg to zero via the roll on live capital; flatten that leg manually with the broker-truth close tool instead.

history.reason: FIXED + TDD-verified (full suite green, exit 0). FIX-1 (sign-blind reconcile runaway): execution/live_loop.py _held_now() and _reconcile_stage2_orphans() now use SIGNED broker qty (not abs), and the orphan trim trades AGAINST the sign (BUYS BACK a short, never sells deeper); gross/lambda sums take abs() explicitly. Two RED->GREEN tests in tests/test_stage2_control_plane.py reproduce the -500->-2000 runaway and assert buy-back-to-flat. FIX-2 (launch_cmd unrunnable): scripts/run_survival_live.py update_launch_cmd_stage2 now ensures --lottery-arm so a control-plane stage-2 sync produces a PARSEABLE argv (watchdog auto-restart works); RED->GREEN test in tests/test_survival_launch_cmd_restart.py parses the synced argv. NOT YET DEPLOYED to the running service (old code in memory; safe as-is since no leg is being dropped to zero — the only trigger). Applies on next watchdog restart (launch_cmd now runnable). B0218 (sod re-anchor only on roll completion) DEFERRED: its live manifestation is resolved by FIX-1 (the roll now converges+completes->re-anchor fires); the residual fix touches the load-bearing daily-kill anchor and is deferred past the live final.
Both fixes (sign-aware reconcile + runnable launch_cmd) implemented, TDD RED->GREEN, full suite green. Deploys on next restart.
